data.description: Fix-it ticket minted by orchestrator (run norm: flaky/slow default suite is a defect). Evidence: PR #41 TS job failed with vitest 'Timeout calling onTaskUpdate' unhandled error — tests/e2e.test.ts spends ~62s running the full cassette pipeline before detecting 'cassette miss / stale' and skipping; the synchronous pipeline blocks the vitest worker event loop past the worker-RPC timeout, failing runs whose tests all pass. Staleness is EXPECTED until MA-24 re-records, and MA-19 (genai 2.x) will stale cassettes for certain, so every remaining PR risks this flake. Fix: (1) cheap staleness pre-check (hash/fingerprint comparison) BEFORE launching the pipeline — stale => immediate skip (or fail under E2E_REQUIRED=1) in <1s; (2) ensure the e2e pipeline invocation does not block the worker event loop (async spawn, not execSync) so long runs cannot trip onTaskUpdate RPC timeouts when cassettes are fresh; (3) keep MA-2's guard semantics (skip vs E2E_REQUIRED=1 hard-fail, dirty-path naming) intact — e2e-guard tests must stay green. No prod code changes outside test harness/e2e plumbing. Serialize: e2e.test.ts (free), vitest config (free). ACs touched: AC-1..AC-5 must remain satisfied; G-1 untouched.
data.title: Fix e2e cassette-staleness fast path and vitest worker flake

data.body:
REVIEW (own-reviewer protocol, diff ba36915 vs origin/main@65142ba — 7 files, +504/-13, all under falcon-detective test harness/e2e plumbing)

VERDICT: APPROVE — no Critical or Major findings.

Correctness:
- Fast path hoists the staleness VERDICT (not the key): manifest fixtures/cassettes/.e2e-fingerprint.json records {model, workflow=sha256(src/**+prompts/**), seed=git tree hash HEAD:falcon-agent}; checkCassetteFreshness compares before pipeline launch. Missing/corrupt/drifted => skip (fail under E2E_REQUIRED=1) with today's 'cassette miss — cassettes are stale relative to the workflow code' prefix and exact 'E2E_REQUIRED=1 but the e2e could not run: ' fail phrasing (via new applyGuardOutcome failPrefix param; MA-2 prereq phrasing untouched).
- Post-pipeline /no cassette for/ catch retained verbatim as authoritative backstop.
- Async conversion verified END-TO-END, not just by inspection: with a matching manifest the pipeline launched via await promisify(execFile), ran 70.2s, and the worker RPC survived (no onTaskUpdate timeout); backstop mapped the real miss to the original skip message. Error.stderr shape on promisified execFile confirmed live. maxBuffer 64MiB on both long spawns.
- hasCassettes now ignores dotfiles so the manifest alone never satisfies AC-4's presence check (tested).

Guard semantics: all 11 pre-existing AC-1..AC-4 tests unchanged and green; 9 new tests (fresh/missing/corrupt manifest, model/workflow/seed drift, required hard-fail phrasing, manifest-not-a-cassette, no-sync-exec source regression on e2e.test.ts).

Scope fence: zero changes under falcon-detective/src/, .github/, falcon-agent/ (G-1), vitest.config.ts.

Minor (accepted): (1) root-sort comparator lacks 0-case for identical roots — harmless, duplicate roots hash identically; (2) fingerprint hashes src/ while the pipeline runs dist/ — a stale dist build could pass the pre-check, but the backstop catches it and CI builds dist immediately before test:full; (3) MA-24 must run 'npm run e2e:fingerprint' after re-recording — failure to do so is LOUD (fast skip / required-fail with instructions), documented in README + script header.

Gates: npm test 58/58 (3.8s); test:full 58 passed + 1 skipped (3.6s total, e2e file 661ms/test body 40ms vs ~62s before); tsc --noEmit clean; biome clean (43 files).

PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/56 (head ba369150a5b20a606daa066c72a76bee819f4fcd, base main, cut from origin/main@65142ba — merges independently). Stale-e2e verdict latency: ~62s + worker-RPC crash (CI run 29103569277) -> 40ms skip. Reviewer verdict: APPROVE, no Critical/Major. Note for MA-24: after re-recording cassettes, run 'npm run e2e:fingerprint' and commit fixtures/cassettes/.e2e-fingerprint.json alongside them.

PR #56 CI green (Rust+TS SUCCESS, MERGEABLE, ba36915). Merge queued for operator (session permission layer scopes merge authorization per-batch). Will be presented together with MA-15/MA-20 PRs when those green.

Merged (PR #56, merge commit dcfda63, operator-authorized batch). Stale e2e verdict 62s→40ms via fingerprint manifest pre-check; sync execFileSync→async execFile kills the onTaskUpdate flake class; MA-2 guard semantics preserved, +9 guard tests.
